evals.prompt: Add a projection to the Author read model that sets Name from AuthorRegistered and marks IsArchived true on AuthorArchived.
evals.expected_output: Model-bound projection attributes on the [ReadModel] ([FromEvent<AuthorRegistered>], [SetValue]/[SetFrom] as needed) relying on AutoMap (on by default); never an explicit .AutoMap() call; no separate projection class unless required.
assertions: Never calls .AutoMap() (AutoMap is on by default)
Projection consumes events, never other read models

evals.prompt: Add a projection that joins author name onto a Book read model from a separate AuthorRenamed event stream.
evals.expected_output: A fluent IProjectionFor<Book> using a join/child relationship keyed appropriately (model-bound cannot express the join); consumes events only.
assertions: Uses fluent IProjectionFor<T> for the join (model-bound cannot express it)
Join is on events/event context, not on another read model
Does not call .AutoMap() outside a .NoAutoMap() scope
